html:
Your Personalized Recovery Plan

Gina’s shedding has followed a wave pattern—calming, then flaring again—but her new baby hairs show that regrowth has begun. The main influence now is gentle, ongoing hormonal change from perimenopause. This plan focuses on stabilizing those waves by anchoring sleep, calming stress, and strengthening nutrition foundations like omega‑3s and protein. Moving from early regrowth toward lasting density, these small daily anchors steady your follicles so progress keeps building. 🌱

Each steady week now multiplies the strength of every new strand. ✨
